---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
strp<-fread("/mnt/16TB/runs/panova_vv/strept.txt")

colnames(strp)<-c("kmers","count")
strp$count
strp$count2<-strp$count/sum(strp$count) #относительная представленность, clr не сделаешь
strp
```

```{r}
setdiff(strp$kmers,data$kmers)
```
```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
kmers_good<-fread("kmers_good_lin_lin0.05rank0.51-0.71.txt",header=FALSE)
#kmers_good
colnames(kmers_good)<-c("kmers")

inter2<-intersect(kmers_good$kmers,strp$kmers) #можно  так, рассматриваются только k-меры
inter2<-data.table(inter2)
#inter2
length(kmers_good$kmers)
write_delim(inter2,"inter_10_lin_lin0.05_strept_rank0.51-0.71.txt")
```
```{r}
setd2<-setdiff(strp$kmers,kmers_good$kmers) #все значения в strp, которые не встречаются в kmers_good
setd2<-data.table(setd2)
setd2
write_delim(setd2,"setd2_10_lin_lin_streptrank0.05_0.51-0.71.txt")
```

```{r}
library(VennDiagram)
v1 <-kmers_good$kmers
v2 <-inter2$inter2
v1
v2
length(v2)
length(v1)
```

```{r}
vlist <- list(v1, v2)

#names(vlist) <- c("list1", "list2")
#venn.diagram(vlist[1:2], 
 #   filename="Venn_2way_lin_exp0.01.png",
  #  imagetype="png", main="Venn diagram",
  #  main.col="red",
  #  fill=c("lightgreen", "lightblue"),
  #  col=c("lightgreen", "lightblue"),
  #  cat.col=c("green", "blue"))

```

```{r}
vlist
```

```{r}
display_venn <- function(vlist){
  library(VennDiagram)
  grid.newpage()
  venn_object <- venn.diagram(vlist[1:2],filename = NULL, fill = c("dodgerblue", "goldenrod1"),  category.names = c("Kmers_good" , "Kmers_good_strept"), cat.col = c("blue", "red"),  cat.cex = rep(1, 2), cex = 1)
  grid.draw(venn_object)
}
```

```{r}
display_venn(vlist)
```

```{r}
v11<-c(v1)
v22<-c(v2)
library("ggvenn")
ggvenn(list("Kmers_good"=v11,"Kmers_good_strept"=v22))
```

```{r}
v3 <-kmers_good$kmers
v4 <-strp$kmers
v3
v4
```

```{r}
display_venn2 <- function(vlist){
  library(VennDiagram)
  grid.newpage()
  venn_object <- venn.diagram(vlist[1:2],filename = NULL,fill = c("dodgerblue", "goldenrod1"),  category.names = c("Kmers_good" , "Kmers_strept_all"), cat.col = c("blue", "red"),  cat.cex = rep(0.6, 2), cex = 1)
  grid.draw(venn_object)
}
```

```{r}
vlist2 <- list(v3, v4)
display_venn2(vlist2)
```
```{r}
v33<-c(v3)
v44<-c(v4)
library("ggvenn")
ggvenn(list("Kmers_good"=v33,"Kmers_strept_all"=v44))
```
